page.heroSubtitle: Real-time edits, built-in polls, clear history. Everyone on the same page, literally.

features.title: Real-time
features.description: Changes appear instantly for all trip participants.

features.title: Comments
features.description: Discuss each element directly in the app, no WhatsApp group needed.

features.title: Permissions
features.description: Set who can edit and who can only view the trip.

faqItems.question: How do I invite friends to collaborate on a trip?
faqItems.answer: Share an invite link or send an email invitation directly from the app. Your friends can join the trip in one click, even without a Weplanify account.

faqItems.question: Are changes really synced in real-time?
faqItems.answer: Yes, all changes are synced instantly using WebSocket technology. You see your co-travelers' edits appear live.

faqItems.question: Can I limit editing permissions?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. The trip creator can set roles: editor (full access), contributor (can suggest changes), or viewer (read-only).

faqItems.question: Is there a limit to the number of participants?
faqItems.answer: No technical limit. We have trips with 50+ participants running smoothly.

faqItems.question: How do you handle editing conflicts?
faqItems.answer: Weplanify handles conflicts automatically. If two people edit the same element, the system intelligently merges changes.

page.ctaSubtitle: Everyone on the same page, in real-time
page.seoTitle: Real-time Collaboration - Group Trip Planning | Weplanify
page.seoDescription: Plan your group trip with friends and family. Real-time edits, integrated discussions, and perfect sync for seamless collaborative organization.
